text.message: Really ruining my build to 10 dream over here
Its better and hea way ahead
Letting people pace army and road all willy nilly D:
Wheat port + best road mat prod
So how do you plan on winning then?
If I get road, blue gets army
Sure but blue doesnt have 3 cities already
red should prolly go for road
But blue has army and I dont
And it's easier to feed road
yea, but you have higher production black
Hard to feed army when a guy is 2 knights ahead and getting 0 blocks
I don't have higher product when I'm blocked+robbed
Well, I can see how this game's gonna go
You guys keep on "evening it out" and then someone monos ftw
And it's too late to do anything about it
I can take it if help
See this is kinda the issue that happens here
The whole "evening things out" thing just makes it so whoever has road has a clear lead
And then it's not actually even at all
I wanna get back to living my build to 10 dream and not be perma blocked
black, without blocking you when you were far ahead on productio, you could have had road and won already
I've had no devs. There was no fear of a rb or mono or anything
well, 2 out of 6 devs not being knights is not crazy
Just that it's good for you
better than 2 more knights i guess, being stuck on 6 points
i guess i dont see your point
or are you just saying things you see maybe
Knights are the worst devs at this point
right, now ive stocked up on knights at least lol
ive got 2 vps, 2 knights and 1 rb
Then by all means use said knight on your turn
Y'know this wouldn't have happened if you didn't hard focus me like I said at the time :/
Could've blocked the 9 ore but you wanted to block my wheat :/
what happend? that the game is still going you mean?
That me being blocked early just means everyone else is scary
Because people aren't playing for high impact blocks
lol, everybody being scary in the end is the sign of a well played game
oj and I are not scary
should force red to play dev
I'm pretty sure there's someone on 9 here
I have to play rb here or oj prob wins next turn
And it seems like you're trying to shift attention
Since you have an open settle
Doing a last minute move to clutch victory
I can assure you red is scarier than oj here
Yep, that's why I'm taking my turn so long
Now what should I use it on
I do have win in hand
And I end the game dead last :(
